CustomField.formula: IF(AND(OR(ISPICKVAL(Product_Type__c, 'Software'),ISPICKVAL(Product_Type__c, 'Software Discount'),ISPICKVAL(Product_Type__c, 'Software Discount (One-Time)')), NOT(CONTAINS(SBQQ__Product__r.Name, 'Payment Adjustment'))), SBQQ__NetTotal__c,0)
CustomField.label: Segment Net Unit Price
